title: Aquaculture 2: Lava Fishing Addon
body:
**NOTE: THIS MOD DOES NOT ADD ANY LOOT ON ITS OWN**

Aquaculture 2: Lava Fishing Addon, adds a handful of fishing hooks that allows for fishing in lava with Aquaculture 2. Additionally it enables the Nether Star Hook from Aquaculture 2, to work in lava as well.  
  
This addon is intended for use by a modpack creator that can add their own lava fishing loot, through a datapack or similar methods.

The addon differentiates between lava fishing (anywhere) and lava fishing in the Nether specifically.  
The loot tables are split in the same style as vanilla overworld fishing. The main fishing files are defined with the same weight/quality values as vanilla - can of course be changed if desired.  
The rest of the loot tables are empty by default. 

__**Lava**__

*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/fishing](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/fishing.json)  _Main lava fishing file_
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/fish](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/fish.json)
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/junk](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/junk.json)
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/treasure](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/treasure.json)

__**Nether**__

*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/fishing](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/fishing.json)  _Main Nether fishing file_
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/fish](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/fish.json)
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/junk](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/junk.json)
*   [aquaculture:loot\_table/gameplay/fishing/lava/treasure](https://github.com/TeamMetallurgy/Aquaculture/blob/master/src/main/resources/data/aquaculture/loot_table/gameplay/fishing/nether/treasure.json)

The lava hooks is still registered under the aquaculture namespace.  
However, the hook recipes is registered under the aq2lava namespace.
